Asked why Christian heaven associated with harps, white robes, leaf crowns. Harps: biblical praise instrument; robes: Revelation symbol of purity/righteousness.
Harps are 5,000 years old. Older/contemporary stringed instruments: lyre (Mesopotamia ~3000 BCE), musical bow (may predate both, African hunter-gatherers).
Ancient strings made from: animal gut (sheep/goat intestines), silk (Han Dynasty China), animal sinew/tendons (Native American/African), plant fibers (flax/hemp).

Submitted mortgage application with pay stubs, bank statements, tax returns. Typical process: initial review (1-3 days), processing (3-5 days), appraisal (5-10 days).
Appraisal determines property value for loan; lender uses to verify property worth >= loan amount. Licensed appraiser inspects property and analyzes comparable sales.
Planning 5% down payment. LTV ratio = loan amount / appraised value. High LTV means higher risk, higher rates, PMI required above 80% LTV.
Loan processor verifies income via: pay stubs (recent, YTD earnings), W-2s (past 2 years), tax returns (past 2 years), verification of employment (VOE) letter.
VOE (Verification of Employment) obtained via: employer form, third-party vendors (Work Number/Verify Job System), phone/email contact, online employer portal.
Interested in Renaissance impact on political theory. Key ideas: humanism (individual potential), social contract (government by consent), political realism, separation of powers.
Renaissance ideas (individualism, democracy) faced resistance. Many feared chaos, believed only elite could govern. Ideas took centuries to gain acceptance.
Renaissance ideas still debated: civic humanism (active citizen participation), republicanism (virtuous citizenry/common good), political theology (religion-politics relationship).

Getting Prayer Plant (Maranta leuconeura). Watering: every 7-10 days spring/summer, every 4-6 weeks fall/winter when top 1-2 inches soil dry. Added to Wednesday plant watering routine.
Prayer Plant ideal humidity: 50-70%. Maintains humidity via: daily misting, humidifier, pebble tray, grouping plants, plastic covering, humid room locations (bathroom/kitchen).
Prayer Plant common pests: spider mites, mealybugs, scale, aphids, whiteflies. Prevention: regular inspection, keep clean, good air circulation, careful watering, neem oil.
User increasing water for spider plant (getting too dry). Previously had whitefly infestation on basil (treated with neem oil, isolated).
Prayer Plant light feeder. Fertilize every 4-6 weeks spring/summer with balanced water-soluble fertilizer (e.g., 20-20-20) diluted to half strength.
Geothermal plants: 10-23% thermal efficiency. Natural gas plants: ~50% efficiency. Geothermal advantages: renewable, low carbon footprint. Disadvantages: location-specific, high exploration costs.
Emerging geothermal technologies: Organic Rankine Cycle, Kalina cycle, supercritical CO2, Enhanced Geothermal Systems (artificial reservoir creation), advanced drilling techniques.
Other renewable energy sources explored: solar (photovoltaic/concentrated), wind (including vertical axis/offshore), hydropower (low-head/wave converters), biomass (gasification/pyrolysis).
Wind energy breakthroughs: longer blades (Haliade-X 107m), improved tech (permanent magnets/power electronics), economies of scale. Costs declining significantly past decade.
Hydropower developments: modular turbine design, advanced materials, pumped storage hydro, run-of-river plants. Increasing efficiency/reliability/cost-effectiveness.
